title: Qlik Sense Security Rule
description: A security rule defines access control policies for Qlik Sense resources. Rules use a condition expression, resource filter, and action bitmask to control which users can perform which operations on which resources. Rules can apply in the QMC context, the Hub context, or both.

id.description: Unique identifier (GUID) assigned by the repository

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rule was created

modifiedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rule was last modified

modifiedByUserName.description: Username of the user who last modified the rule

name.description: Display name of the security rule

rule.description: Rule condition expression using Qlik Sense security rule syntax. Evaluates user and resource properties to determine access.

resourceFilter.description: Resource filter expression defining which resources the rule applies to (e.g., App_*, Stream_*)

comment.description: Human-readable description or comment about the rule's purpose

disabled.description: Whether the rule is currently disabled

ruleContext.description: Context in which the rule applies

tags.description: Tags applied to the security rule

privileges.description: List of privileges the current user has on this rule

schemaPath.description: Schema path identifying the entity type in the QRS
